name: Qu Gong
page_title: Qu Gong 瞿恭 – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Qu Gong was a bandit leader living between the Huai and Ru rivers along with Shen Cheng and Jiang Gong around AD 200. Li Tong began launching campaigns to clear them out and they were eventually destroyed. Li Tong delivered their heads to Cao Cao which earned him the title Marquis of a Chief Commune and was appointed Grand Administrator of Runan for his deeds.

sections.short-biography: Bandit who was defeated and killed by Li Tong.

full_text:
Qu Gong 瞿恭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qu Gong (瞿恭). Bandit who was defeated and killed by Li Tong. Qu Gong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Qu Gong was a bandit leader living between the Huai and Ru rivers along with Shen Cheng and Jiang Gong around AD 200. Li Tong began launching campaigns to clear them out and they were eventually destroyed. Li Tong delivered their heads to Cao Cao which earned him the title Marquis of a Chief Commune and was appointed Grand Administrator of Runan for his deeds.
